skill.core.sorcery.description.advanced:
{Advanced Sorcery}

Advanced Sorcery causes a hero's spells to inflict an additional 20% damage in combat.
skill.core.sorcery.description.basic:
{Basic Sorcery}

Basic Sorcery causes a hero's spells to inflict an additional 10% damage in combat.
skill.core.sorcery.description.expert:
{Expert Sorcery}

Expert Sorcery causes a hero's spells to inflict an additional 30% damage in combat.
